body.title: Inference I/O corpus — capture every byte upstream↔downstream for training
body.description:
**Hard rule (Akien, 2026-07-04):** every single byte crossing the inference boundary — the complete request handed downstream to the model (system + messages + tools + params) and the complete raw response handed back — is persisted, for training. Metadata-only cost_record was never enough; the actual bytes were lost, which is a data-gathering gap that has been costing us (surfaced by the 2026-07-04 coding funnel: we could not see the architect's actual words).

**Built:** unseen_university/devices/inference/io_corpus.py (schema inference.io.v1, append-only dated JSONL under UU_INFERENCE_CORPUS override else uu_home()/inference_corpus) + InferenceDevice._capture_io wired into dispatch on ALL three exit paths (success with raw+resp; no-source chokepoint and raised-call capture the request with outcome=error), mirroring _emit_cost_record so no call escapes capture. Fail-soft: a corpus write can never break a dispatch.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/io_corpus.py (new), unseen_university/devices/inference/device.py (_capture_io + 3 call sites), tests/inference/test_io_corpus.py (new).
**Design rules:** homogeneity (ONE capture point every call crosses), log-every-interface-crossing, fail-soft, no-sqlite (flat JSONL), proof-on-close.
**Completion criteria:** every dispatch writes a corpus record carrying both the upstream request bytes and the downstream raw response bytes; metadata-only is insufficient.
**Scope boundary:** IN — full request+raw-response capture at InferenceDevice.dispatch, all exit paths, fail-soft, dated JSONL corpus, tests. OUT — literal per-source wire-envelope bytes (the structured request is the faithful, complete model input); corpus rotation/retention/compaction; the training pipeline that consumes the corpus.
**Test plan:** tests/inference/test_io_corpus.py — a real dispatch through a mock source writes a corpus record containing the distinctive request-message token AND the distinctive raw-response token (proof node); a no-source dispatch still captures the request with outcome=error; io_corpus.capture round-trips a schema-stamped record. Proof: red where dispatch captures nothing (empty corpus → AssertionError), green where the full bytes land.
**intention:** I intend that every byte of inference I/O is durably captured so the compiled-inference/DS.0-leveling effort has a complete training corpus.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: PROVEN. Every byte upstream↔downstream captured at InferenceDevice.dispatch → io_corpus.py (inference.io.v1 JSONL). Proof commit=e9b1e1e6 red=AssertionError green=passed. Wired on all 3 exit paths, fail-soft. Corpus: UU_INFERENCE_CORPUS override else uu_home()/inference_corpus/<date>.io.jsonl.
